name: Milvia School Transportation
districts_or_customers: Likely Osceola County / Kissimmee-area private contracts; not confirmed
recent_news: No M&A or news found; appears as an unclaimed Manta listing in Kissimmee, FL with ~$67K-$120K revenue and ~2 employees.
fit_notes: Sub-scale single-operator (2 employees, ~$120K revenue). Too small to be a meaningful Summit tuck-in; only relevant as a route-acquisition or driver/asset add-on if Summit pursues an Orlando/Kissimmee roll-up.

name: A B C School Transportation
districts_or_customers: Likely Miami-Dade private school/charter routes; not confirmed. Distinct from 'ABC School Bus Service' (abcschoolbus.com) and 'Air B School Bus Transportation, Inc.' which are separate Miami operators.
recent_news: No M&A or news found; small household-address operator (11232 SW 159th Pl, Miami) with ~$89K revenue and ~2 employees.
fit_notes: Sub-scale owner-operator at a residential address. Not an actionable Summit tuck-in target; consider only as part of a broader Miami-Dade route consolidation.

name: Bus Service KIK
districts_or_customers: South Florida (Miramar/Miami-Dade/Broward area) private school routes; not confirmed.
recent_news: Florida Profit Corporation 'KIK SCHOOL BUS SERVICE' (P17000026609) registered 2017 at 13213 SW 51st St, Miramar, FL 33027; reinstated 10/05/2023 (active). No M&A or news found.
fit_notes: Sub-scale single-operator (2 employees, ~$89K revenue). Reinstated 2023 after lapse suggests fragile operation. Not a stand-alone Summit tuck-in; route/asset-only relevance.

name: Busy Bee School Bus Inc
owner_or_parent: independent (likely affiliated with Barbara School Bus Service Inc, Hialeah)
fleet_size_est: 1-3 buses (separate from Barbara School Bus Service's ~26-unit fleet)
districts_or_customers: Miami-Dade/Hialeah private school contracts (presumed). Affiliated entity Barbara School Bus Service operates ~26 buses.
recent_news: Busy Bee School Bus Inc (P19000092872) filed 12/09/2019, INACTIVE as of 09/26/2025 per Sunbiz. Same principals (Barbara/Pedro Perez) run the larger, still-active Barbara School Bus Service Inc (DOT #2064672, ~26 units, founded 2000).
fit_notes: Busy Bee itself is now INACTIVE, but principals Barbara/Pedro Perez own the active Barbara School Bus Service Inc (~26 buses, Hialeah, founded 2000) - that affiliated entity is the more legitimate Summit tuck-in candidate in Miami-Dade, with 25+ year operating history suggesting potential succession opportunity.
